messages.content:
Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.

wolfSSL wolfMQTT 1.9 has a heap-based buffer overflow (8 bytes) in MqttDecode_Publish (called from MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket).

The wolfSSL wolfMQTT version 1.9 contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the MqttDecode_Publish function. This function is invoked by MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket.
